summary: Strong-pi pulsed ODMR alignment screen for freshly tracked fallback candidate reimage1804_c02.
scientific_rationale: Fresh re-image fallback candidate reimage1804_c02 tracked successfully with final_counts_kcps=39.690 after reimage1804_c01 was rejected by terminal strong-pi pODMR. A magnetic-field-aligned ms=+1 NV should show a clear strong-pi pulsed ODMR dip near 3.875 GHz; no clear usable resonance in 3.825-3.925 GHz rejects this candidate for aligned follow-up.
comparison_targets: same-wake c01 pODMR route/settings terminal completion
expected_evidence: terminal bridge result with savedexperiment path
readout-aware resonance/alignment review; no automatic bridge fit
success_criteria: Bridge execute completes with nonzero averages and saved data
raw/readout-aware review shows clear usable resonance in 3.825-3.925 GHz
tracking/counts do not collapse below hard gate
stop_conditions: Track/count gate fails with zero averages; review as count/freshness evidence before retry
hardware/safety/code uncertainty or explicit human STOP

expected_signal_model.transition: ms=+1 near 3.875 GHz in current field setup
expected_signal_model.contrast_basis: current setup reference from NV_RESEARCH_MEMORY: mS=0 to mS=+1 PL contrast about 22%
expected_signal_model.distinguishability: Expected resonant dip about 22% is roughly 98x the binomial shot-noise floor and spans about 4.6 frequency steps; a usable aligned resonance in-window should be visible in raw/readout-aware review.
expected_signal_model.readout_role_from_xml: Rabimodulated.xml with full_expt=0 records first detection as mS=0 reference and final detection after length_rabi_pulse as signal; no mS=+1 reference detection is active.
expected_signal_model.normalization_rule: Judge signal presence from raw signal and fitted-reference-normalized views; do not promote point-wise normalization-only features.
